reply.text: My therapist is going to need a second opinion on this one

messages.text: food vibes relax i got this
you’re arguing with emphasis, not distance
keep the confidence, fix the line
you swear you’re out but never leave
you say that like it is new
you show up “by accident” very on purpose
you argue like comments are turned on
you push back with suspicious enthusiasm
wednesday night. i'll pick you up
